calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2024 Off Calendar

MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar May-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF BILLY SIMS' MOTION TO DISMISS.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "request for dismissal of individual and class action claims pursuant to Rule 3.770 of the California Rules of Court" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-25-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Feb-09-2024 Continued To Apr-24-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
